zh-cn.exp_event_caveClearPool_ongoing: $names$在洞穴中发现一潭清澈见底的水池
zh-cn.exp_event_caveClearPool_result_refreshin: $names$在水池边饮水，感到神清气爽
zh-cn.exp_event_caveClearPool_result_hiddenFin: $names$在水池底部发现了有用的物品
zh-cn.exp_event_caveClearPool_result_relaxed: $names$在水池旁稍作休息，感到放松
zh-cn.exp_event_caveClearPool_result_fishSpot: $names$在水池中发现了可捕捞的鱼群

en-us.exp_event_caveClearPool_ongoing: $names$ found a crystal-clear pool of water in the cave
en-us.exp_event_caveClearPool_result_refreshin: $names$ drank from the pool and felt refreshed
en-us.exp_event_caveClearPool_result_hiddenFin: $names$ found useful items at the bottom of the pool
en-us.exp_event_caveClearPool_result_relaxed: $names$ rested by the pool and felt relaxed
en-us.exp_event_caveClearPool_result_fishSpot: $names$ spotted a school of fish in the pool
